mapper.select:
SELECT L.ID, L.COMP_CD, L.CLOSE_NO, L.CLOSE_YM, L.VD_CD, L.VD_NM, L.TOT_SUPL_AMT, L.TOT_VAT_AMT, L.TOT_AMT, L.ADJ_AMT, L.NET_AMT, L.GR_CNT, L.LOCK_YN, L.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, L.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(L.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM CL_CLOSE L LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='CL_STS' AND C.CD=L.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE L.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (L.CLOSE_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.VD_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND L.STS = #{sts} AND L.CLOSE_YM = #{closeYm} ORDER BY L.ID DESC

SELECT L.ID, L.COMP_CD, L.CLOSE_NO, L.CLOSE_YM, L.VD_CD, L.VD_NM, L.TOT_SUPL_AMT, L.TOT_VAT_AMT, L.TOT_AMT, L.ADJ_AMT, L.NET_AMT, L.GR_CNT, L.PAY_TERM_CD, PT.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_TERM_NM, L.PAY_METHOD_CD, PM.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_METHOD_NM, TO_CHAR(L.PAY_DUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DUE_YMD, L.LOCK_YN, L.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, L.REMARK, L.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(L.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM CL_CLOSE L LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='CL_STS' AND C.CD=L.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE PT ON PT.GRP_CD='PAY_TERM' AND PT.CD=L.PAY_TERM_CD AND PT.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE PM ON PM.GRP_CD='PAY_METHOD' AND PM.CD=L.PAY_METHOD_CD AND PM.DEL_YN='N' WHERE L.ID = #{id} AND L.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT ID, CLOSE_ID, GR_ID, GR_NO, TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GR_YMD, PO_NO, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, AMT FROM CL_CLOSE_GR WHERE CLOSE_ID = #{closeId} ORDER BY GR_ID

SELECT G.ID AS GR_ID, G.GR_NO, TO_CHAR(G.GR_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GR_YMD, G.PO_NO, G.VD_NM, NVL(T.SUPL,0) AS SUPL_AMT, NVL(T.VAT,0) AS VAT_AMT FROM GR_RECEIPT G LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RECEIPT_ID, SUM(AMT) AS SUPL, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(TAX_TYP,'TAX')='TAX' THEN ROUND(AMT*0.1) ELSE 0 END) AS VAT FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GROUP BY RECEIPT_ID ) T ON T.RECEIPT_ID = G.ID WHERE G.DEL_YN='N' AND G.STS='CFM' AND G.VD_CD = #{vdCd} AND TO_CHAR(G.GR_YMD,'YYYYMM') = #{closeYm} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CL_CLOSE_GR CG JOIN CL_CLOSE CC ON CC.ID = CG.CLOSE_ID WHERE CG.GR_ID = G.ID AND CC.STS != 'CANCEL' AND CC.DEL_YN='N') ORDER BY G.GR_YMD, G.ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CL_CLOSE (COMP_CD, CLOSE_NO, CLOSE_YM, VD_CD, VD_NM, TOT_SUPL_AMT, TOT_VAT_AMT, TOT_AMT, GR_CNT, PAY_TERM_CD, PAY_METHOD_CD, PAY_DUE_YMD, LOCK_YN, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{closeNo}, #{closeYm}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, NVL(#{totSuplAmt},0), NVL(#{totVatAmt},0), NVL(#{totAmt},0), NVL(#{grCnt},0), #{payTermCd}, #{payMethodCd}, TO_DATE(#{payDueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'N', 'TMP', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})

INSERT INTO CL_CLOSE_GR (CLOSE_ID, GR_ID, GR_NO, GR_YMD, PO_NO, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, AMT, REG_ID) VALUES (#{closeId}, #{grId}, #{grNo}, TO_DATE(#{grYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{poNo}, NVL(#{suplAmt},0), NVL(#{vatAmt},0), NVL(#{amt},0), 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE CL_CLOSE SET STS=#{sts}, LOCK_YN=#{lockYn}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CL_CLOSE SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
